title: Reign of Nether: Fortress Battle
description: RTS(Real Time Stratagy) Modpack. The main mod is Reign of Nether. The modpack has not only optimization, but also a lot of bosses with custom loot.
body:
# This modpack gives you the opportunity to turn your minecraft into RTS(Real Time Strategy).
When you create a world, you need to press the f12 button to enter RTS mode. Immerse yourself in a world similar to Warcraft where you will have to create your own settlement and develop it. All thanks to the Reign Of Nether mod installed on the assembly.

Download the datapack from the creator of the Reign of Nether mod for the best game. https://edge.forgecdn.net/files/5816/813/reign_of_nether_datapack.zip

# Information

- The bosses from the mutant monsters mod have been changed in the modpack. Now ore iron falls from them after death.

# An advantage over other modpacks.

- There are new bosses and maps.
- Custom loot tables.
- Good optimization.
- Custom mod settings.
